_comment: Durable batch-progress record for 'remix every non-ready (cloned) design, one by one'. This is the file that lets ANY session — after a crash, a restart, or a brand new chat — know exactly where the batch left off, without relying on conversation memory. 'queue' is the fixed, ordered scope decided when the batch started; it never changes. Progress is NOT duplicated here — check scripts/remix-queue-status.mjs (or cross-reference remix-map.json values) to see which ids are done vs still pending, so this file can never drift out of sync with the real source of truth.

excludedAtStart.DAHPVXi2XbY: only 1 slide — not a real carousel, permanently excluded from this batch

note: DAHO3nrn8r4 was originally excluded as 'already generating elsewhere' but that turned out to be a stale/crashed row (marked back to cloned 2026-07-17) — it IS included in the queue below.
